atomic_claims: Stop hook executa fs.readFileSync(0) (synchronous stdin read)
Stop hook tem feature flag stopReviewGate (default false)
fs.readFileSync(0) e chamado ANTES do check da feature flag
No Windows Git Bash, parent process nao fecha stdin do child
implicit_assumptions_in_symptom: Symptom assume que erro e timing-only — pode ser tambem ordering
first_principles_decomposition.failure_locus: stop-review-gate-hook.mjs readHookInput entry — I/O syscall posicionado pre-flag-check

proposed_root_cause_hypotheses.hypothesis: fs.readFileSync(0) bloqueia indefinidamente quando stdin nao e closed pelo parent; Windows Git Bash nao fecha stdin como Linux/macOS o fariam
reasoning_chain: fs.readFileSync(0) e blocking syscall ate EOF
EOF em stdin so vem quando parent fecha pipe (close fd)
CC harness em Windows Git Bash provavelmente nao fecha (issue conhecida com pipe handles em MSYS)
Manifest timeout 900ms termina silently antes de produzir erro stderr
proposed_root_cause_hypotheses.what_would_disprove: Reproduzir o issue em Linux com stdin /dev/null forcado — se ainda travar, hipotese stdin-handling Windows-specific e errada

proposed_root_cause_hypotheses.hypothesis: Race condition entre stdin read e feature flag check (ambos no mesmo turn de event loop)
reasoning_chain: Se readHookInput e async e flag check tambem, podem race
Mas readFileSync e SYNC — entao race nao se aplica
proposed_root_cause_hypotheses.what_would_disprove: Codigo mostra readFileSync (sync) — hipotese descartavel via leitura do source

architectural_lens_view.boundary_violated: I/O layer atravessou config layer — feature flag deveria gate I/O, nao pos-I/O. Ordem de leitura: 1) read manifest config, 2) check flag, 3) IF flag → read stdin. Atual: 1) read stdin (blocks), 2) check flag.
architectural_lens_view.alternative_design_that_would_prevent: Pattern 'gate-before-side-effect': qualquer I/O bloqueante deve estar dentro de branch condicional que valida config primeiro. Implementavel como: try { config = readConfig(); if (config.stopReviewGate) { input = readHookInput(); } } catch ...

gaps: Nao verifiquei o source de stop-review-gate-hook.mjs diretamente — archaeologist deve confirmar a ordem real do codigo
